name: Payment 1 Loans - Del City
description_short: Payment 1 Financial offers personal installment loans and title loans to Del City, OK residents with fast approval and flexible payment options since May 2021.
description_long:
Payment 1 Financial established its Del City, Oklahoma branch in May 2021, operating from a physical location at 4720 SE 29th Street. The company serves the local community with in-person and remote loan application options, positioning itself as a personalized lending solution provider for residents facing unexpected expenses or cash needs.

The company offers two primary loan products: personal installment loans for general expenses, emergencies, home repairs, or debt purposes, and title loans that allow borrowers to use vehicle equity as collateral while retaining driving privileges. Both products are marketed with competitive rates, flexible payment schedules, and rapid approval timelines. The application process spans four steps—application submission, document verification (income, address, ID, bank statements, and references), loan offer review, and same-day or next-day funding via check or debit card deposit.

Payment 1 distinguishes itself through same-day funding capability, a 4.9/5 star rating across 50,000+ customer reviews, and credit-building claims for personal loans. The company operates extended weekend hours (Saturday 9 AM–1 PM) and offers multiple application channels: in-person visits, phone consultation, and online applications. Their title loan product explicitly permits continued vehicle use during repayment, with lien release promised upon final payment.

A key limitation is the lack of transparent APR or rate information on the website—competitive rate claims are unsubstantiated. The company requires five personal references as part of underwriting, which is more extensive than typical lenders. Title loans carry inherent risks of vehicle loss if defaults occur. Personal loan amounts and maximum terms are not disclosed, limiting consumer ability to pre-assess suitability before application.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding capability with immediate check or debit card distribution
Physical branch location with extended Saturday hours (9 AM–1 PM) plus weekday service
Title loans permit continued vehicle use during repayment period
4.9/5 star rating across 50,000+ verified customer reviews
Multiple application channels: in-person, phone (405-672-5155), and online portal
Personal loans marketed as credit-building tools with flexible payment plans
Clear four-step process with transparent document requirements upfront
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fees disclosed on website—'competitive rates' claim is unverified
Requires five personal references for underwriting, more extensive than most lenders
Title loans create vehicle loss risk in default scenarios; lien placement requires state filing
Loan amounts, maximum terms, and repayment schedules not disclosed pre-application
Limited service area (Texas, Oklahoma, New Mexico, Missouri only) restricts nationwide access
best_for: Del City, OK residents needing same-day or next-day personal loans for unexpected expenses
Vehicle owners with clear titles seeking emergency cash while retaining car access
Borrowers seeking credit improvement through installment loan repayment history
Consumers preferring in-person lending relationships over fully digital lenders
diagnosis: Payment 1 Financial is best suited for Del City-area residents with immediate cash needs ($1K–mid-range personal loans or vehicle-based emergency funding) who can visit in-person or prefer phone interaction and value same-day funding. The primary caveat is the complete absence of rate and fee transparency—borrowers must contact the company directly to understand true borrowing costs before committing, and title loan applicants should understand vehicle loss risk in default scenarios.
services: Personal installment loans for unplanned expenses and emergencies
Title loans using vehicle equity as collateral
Online loan applications (unavailable for New Mexico)
Phone-based loan consultation and application assistance
In-person branch visits for application and funding
Same-day or next-day loan funding via check or debit card
Vehicle title lien placement and state registration
Lien removal and title return upon loan repayment
Flexible payment plan options and schedules
Credit-building loan structures with installment reporting
